content: I'm still getting used to living in Berlin, but I'm really loving the city so far. The food, the culture, the people - everything is just so great.
Berlin is a wonderful city, Casey. What made you decide to move there, and how's the transition been for you so far?

I moved here for work - I'm an Environmental Policy Advisor, and I wanted to be in a city that's really at the forefront of sustainability and innovation. The transition has been a bit challenging, but I'm loving the opportunity to learn a new language and immerse myself in a new culture.
That's great, Casey. Berlin is definitely a city that's pushing the boundaries of sustainability and innovation. What do you like to do in your free time, and how do you like to explore the city?

I love hiking and exploring the outdoors, and Berlin has some amazing parks and green spaces. I also enjoy baking sourdough bread and trying out new recipes. And of course, I love spending time with my border collie, Thor - he's such a sweet boy and always keeps me on my toes.
That sounds like a great way to spend your free time, Casey. What inspired you to start baking sourdough, and what's your favorite type of bread to make?

I've always loved baking, and I found that sourdough was a great way to challenge myself and create something really unique and delicious. My favorite type of bread to make is probably a tie between a classic sourdough and a more experimental recipe like a fig and walnut bread.
That sounds amazing, Casey. I'm sure your bread is delicious. What do you like to do with Thor, and how does he like living in Berlin?

Thor loves living in Berlin - there are so many great parks and green spaces for him to explore. We love going on hikes and playing fetch, and he's also really into agility training. He's such a smart boy and always keeps me on my toes.
That's great, Casey. It's wonderful that you're able to share your love of the outdoors with Thor. What's your favorite type of music to listen to, and do you have any favorite artists or bands?
I love listening to electronic music, and I'm a big fan of artists like Four Tet and Bonobo. There's something about the energy and atmosphere of their music that really resonates with me.
That's great, Casey. Electronic music can be really uplifting and energizing. What do you like to do to relax and unwind, aside from listening to music and spending time with Thor?

I love practicing drone photography and taking photos of the city. It's such a great way to see Berlin from a new perspective and capture some amazing shots. And I also enjoy aquariums - there's something about the beauty and tranquility of the underwater world that really calms me down.

That's wonderful, Casey. Drone photography and aquariums are both great ways to relax and appreciate the beauty of the world around us. Thanks for chatting with me - it's been great getting to know you!
